title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.14 - New multiplayer card Duet (Uncommon, cost 1): target another player and run Swap 6/10 + Invert 2/3 for them simultaneously - a co-op ultimate version of Give and Take.
